results.title: Arbaaz Khan's wife Sshura Khan shuts down troll for age-shaming actor with savage reply
results.description: Sshura Khan shut down a troll who called Arbaaz Khan an 'old man' during an Instagram Q&A the reply went viral.

results.title: Jewar Farmers Board First Commercial Flight from Noida International Airport to Lucknow
results.description: Jewar, Uttar Pradesh: In a historic moment for the region, farmers from Jewar travelled to Lucknow aboard the first commercial flight operated from the newly inaugurated Noida International Airport on Monday, marking the start of scheduled passenger services from the airport. The inaugural flight carried a special delegation of farmers whose families had contributed land for [...] The post Jewar Farmers Board First Commercial Flight from Noida International Airport to Lucknow first appeared on THE ARYAVARTH EXPRESS - YOUR OWN ENGLISH DAILY NEWS PORTAL .

results.title: Assam gets four new GI tags, boosting recognition of indigenous heritage products
results.description: Guwahati, June 15: Assam has added four more treasures to its growing list of Geographical Indication (GI)-tagged products, with Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma hailing the development as a proud moment for the state and a significant step towards preserving and promoting its rich cultural heritage. results.title: Elon Musk says becoming world’s first quadrillionaire is ‘not impossible’; says Moon and Mars factories must come first
results.description: Elon Musk suggested quadrillionaire status is achievable with lunar and Martian factories, envisioning an economy based on mass and energy. This follows SpaceX's historic $75 billion IPO, valuing the company at over $2.1 trillion and making Musk the world's first trillionaire. SpaceX's vision now includes off-Earth AI manufacturing and lunar industry as steps toward interplanetary economies.
